---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new .dops tool or improvement to an existing one
title: "[Tool Request] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Tool Category

- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Containers & Orchestration
- [ ] Monitoring & Logging
- [ ] Security & Compliance
- [ ] Other

## Tool Name

Name of the tool (e.g., `spinnaker`, `consul`):

## Description

What configuration does this tool generate? Why is it useful?

## Example Use Case

```
dojops "example prompt for the tool"
```

Expected output format and content.

## Additional Context

Links to documentation, example configurations, or related tools.
